/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -Wall -Wextra -Wfatal-errors -fopenmp -ggdb3 -O2 -march=native -mtune=native -std=c++11 -Wall -Wextra -Wfatal-errors -pthread -fopenmp -ggdb3 -O2 -march=native -mtune=native -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/lagrange_polynomial_evaluation.dir/lagrange_polynomial_evaluation_example.cpp.o -o lagrange_polynomial_evaluation  ../../libff/libff/libff.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so ../../libzm.a
